content: Olfrid Battle-Born: Gods damn it, Jenassa. Saw one of them Gray-Mane cunts eye-fucking my daughter again outside the marketplace. Like a skeever in heat, that one. Jenassa: Then perhaps she should gut him slowly. Or let him take her. Either way, the streets would be cleaner. Olfrid Battle-Born: Ha! You’ve got a spine of steel, dark elf. But I’d rather see that bastard’s balls nailed to the Whiterun gate than let him near Alfhild. Jenassa: Pity. A good hate-fuck can loosen a man’s grip on grudges.
